hooks.command: agent=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('agent_name','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] >>> Subagent STARTED: $agent"

agent=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('agent_name','unknown'))" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] <<< Subagent FINISHED: $agent"
